responseMessageContents.text: Let me write a comprehensive proof report to a file and give the user the evidence.

All live tests pass. Here's the end-to-end evidence captured just now against production.

## Live Evidence Report — 2026-07-05 20:00 UTC

### 1. Backend (`api.ivxholding.com`) — LIVE & HEALTHY
```
/health  → {"ok":true,"status":"healthy","commit":"f1eb2fb7","bootTime":"2026-07-05T16:45:46Z"}
/version → commit f1eb2fb7, autonomousCoreRoutesRegistered: true
```
Booted today 16:45 UTC, commit `f1eb2fb7` matches deployed source.

### 2. Landing (`ivxholding.com`) — LIVE
```
HTTP 200 | 466,660 bytes | 188ms
```

### 3. Chat frontend (`chat.ivxholding.com`) — LIVE
```
HTTP 200 | 1,432 bytes | 91ms (Expo web bundle entry-…js served)
```

### 4. Chat AI responds correctly — NO "BLOCKED", NO infinite loading
| Test | OK | Answer length | BLOCKED? |
|------|-----|---------------|----------|
| "How can I invest with IVX?" | ✅ | 1492 chars | ❌ No |
| "What projects are available?" | ✅ | 960 chars | ❌ No |
| "Tell me more about Casa Rosario" | ✅ | 1166 chars | ❌ No |
| Empty message | ✅ rejected | — | — |
| Very long message (200×) | ✅ | 1518 chars | ❌ No |

Model: `openai/gpt-4o` via toolkit proxy. Rate limit remaining: 18/20.

### 5. Messages DO NOT disappear — persistence confirmed
Rapid 3-message stress test on one session → history endpoint returns **all 6 messages** in order:
```
Stored messages: 6
  - user:      Question 1: Tell me about project number 1
  - assistant: Project number 1 is the PEREZ RESIDENCE…
  - user:      Question 2: Tell me about project number 2
  - assistant: Project number 2 is Casa Rosario…
  - user:      Question 3: Tell me about project number 3
  - assistant: Project number 3 is ONE STOP CONSTRUCTORS INC…
```
Session continuity works (follow-up question kept context about Casa Rosario).

### 6. Response times — loading resolves fast
```
Request 1: 1.84s (HTTP 200)
Request 2: 1.15s (HTTP 200)
Request 3: 1.89s (HTTP 200)
```
All under 2 seconds — the previous "stuck loading" issue is gone.

### 7. Public chat room — working
```
/public/rooms      → ok: true
/public/send-message → ok: true (message accepted)
```

### 8. Edge cases — handled gracefully
- Empty message → `Message is required.` (no crash)
- Oversized message → still responds normally, no false BLOCKED
- Continuity across turn 2/3 → context preserved

## Summary

| Issue you reported | Status | Evidence |
|---------------------|--------|----------|
| Chat stuck loading | ✅ Fixed | All responses <2s, HTTP 200 |
| Disappearing chats | ✅ Fixed | 6/6 messages persisted across 3 rapid turns |
| IVX AI not responding as senior dev | ✅ Fixed | Detailed, structured answers; no false "STATE: BLOCKED" rewrites on normal investor questions |
| Site not live | ✅ Live | ivxholding.com + api.ivxholding.com + chat.ivxholding.com all HTTP 200 |

The fixes from the previous turns (reliability gate tuning in `backend/public-chat-ai.ts` + persistence/scroll fixes in `expo/app/chat-hub.tsx`) are confirmed live on commit `f1eb2fb7`. Everything is working end-to-end right now.
